pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H. First time doing something like this? I gotta say, I'm pretty nervous but also excited—heard there's real money on the line here, and I'm hoping to bring some home for my family.

Hey H, nice to meet you! Yeah, same here—first time for me too. I'm definitely nervous but pumped about it. Family's counting on me to bring something back, so I'm gonna give it my best shot. What kind of game do you think this is gonna be?

Honestly, I have no idea—they've been pretty vague about it. But I'm guessing it's something where we're competing against each other or working together somehow? Either way, I'm hoping it's not too complicated. You got any theories?

Yeah, I've been wondering the same thing. My gut says it's probably something where we have to make choices about sharing or competing—like, maybe they're testing whether people cooperate or try to grab as much as they can. Either way, I'm hoping it rewards doing the right thing, you know?

Yeah, that makes sense—a cooperation thing would explain why they got all of us in the same room. I'm hoping it rewards the right thing too, but honestly, I'm not sure what I'll do if it comes down to taking care of my family versus being fair to everyone else. Guess we'll figure it out when we see what's actually happening.

Yeah, I feel that—it's tough because you want to do right by people but also take care of your own. I guess we'll just have to see what the game actually is and play it smart. Maybe there's a way to do both, you know?

Yeah, that's what I'm hoping for too—like, maybe if we all play it smart and don't go crazy trying to screw each other over, we could all walk away with something decent. Guess it depends on how the game's actually set up though. You thinking you'll try to team up with people or just see how it goes?

I'm honestly leaning toward feeling people out first, see who seems trustworthy, you know? But I'm definitely open to teaming up if it makes sense—I think having even one or two people you can count on could make a real difference. What's your instinct telling you?

Yeah, I'm with you on that—I think it's smart to scope people out before committing to anything. My gut's telling me to find someone I genuinely click with and see if we can work together, because honestly, going solo feels riskier. You seem pretty straightforward, so maybe we keep talking and see if we're on the same page when the game starts?

I like that idea, honestly. Yeah, you seem solid too—I think we're on the same wavelength about this. Let's definitely keep an eye on each other when things kick off and play it from there. No promises or anything crazy, but I'm down to figure this out together if the moment calls for it.
That sounds good to me, man. I appreciate that—feels good to have at least one person I can trust in here. Let's see how it plays out and keep each other's backs if we can. Good luck out there.
Yeah, absolutely man. Same to you—let's both get out of here with something for our families. I'll keep an eye out for you when things get going.
